data.name: Clicky Bunny
data.detailed_description:
Clicky Bunny is a shameless, dopamine-pumping NSFW Clicker with light Resource Management made for people who just want to click a ridiculous number of times on a cute anime bunny girl and unlock lewd animated loops.

No story. No complicated systems. Just you, one very eager bunny, and an endless stream of carrots.

Core gameplay loop 🥕

  • Click the bunny to earn Carrots

  • Spend Carrots on upgrades (stronger clicks, multiplier, auto-clicker, special chance…)

  • After enough clicks → enter a quick minigame to earn Hearts

  • Ascend when you're ready → get a precious Key, reset your progress + choose one effect for the next run: more Hearts or Carrots or a small inconvenience for extra Key ...or to just change things up.

Rewards & Content ❤️

  • 30 scenes and 12 effect cards you can view in...

  • Gallery "shop" system - spend Hearts & Keys to view what you want (or unlock all at once)

  • Set your favorite unlocked animation/image as the main game background

  • Select from 12 unique effect cards to vary each prestige run - kinda roguelite, but not really

The whole experience is designed to be completed in ~4–5 hours (more or less). Perfect for short bursts of clicking or long cozy "just one more prestige" sessions.

Sometimes you don't need hours of plot or complex mechanics… you just need one very clickable bunny girl and plenty of reasons to keep coming back.

data.short_description: Adult-Only Clicker. Click, upgrade, and unlock! Collect Carrots to power up your progress, master a minigame for Hearts, and Ascend to earn Keys, while each run is slightly different. Spend your tokens to unlock animations and images!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: any x86_64 CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with full Vulkan 1.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux distribution released after 2016
  • 處理器: any x86_64 CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with full Vulkan 1.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: any x86_64 CPU
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated graphics with full Vulkan 1.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Linux distribution released after 2016
  • Processor: any x86_64 CPU
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated graphics with full Vulkan 1.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
